title: CrowdStrike vs Heap
description: Compare CrowdStrike vs Heap — a security & compliance platform versus a analytics & data solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: CrowdStrike (Security & Compliance) and Heap (Analytics & Data) serve different primary purposes. CrowdStrike has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is security & compliance or analytics & data capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between CrowdStrike and Heap?
faqs.answer: CrowdStrike is a security & compliance tool, while Heap is a analytics & data platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can CrowdStrike replace Heap?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, CrowdStrike or Heap?
faqs.answer: CrowdStrike ($8-12/device/mo) and Heap ($5k-10k/yr) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
